author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو زكريا يحيى بن معين بن عون بن زياد بن بسطام بن عبد الرحمن
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and one of the leading figures in the science of hadith criticism.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the early hadith collections that include narrations, jurisprudential issues, and biographical evaluations of narrators.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contains unique hadith narrations and jurisprudential discussions not found in other works of Ibn Ma'in, making it a valuable resource for hadith and fiqh studies.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdullah Muhammad Hassan Damfu is recognized for his meticulous editorial work in Islamic texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The editor provided a critical edition with annotations and a rare biography of the narrator Abu Mansur al-Shaybani.
